calendar.matters:
FOR HEARING ON PETITIONER IRIS RENEE JACKSON'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME

Off Calendar Sep-04-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for a name change.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:26:15 a.m. and concluding at 9:28:10 a.m. (D505).

Petitioner Iris Renee Jackson appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

Order to show cause filed Mar-12-2024.
Proof of publication filed on Apr-25-2024.
Notice of Hearing filed Aug-01-2024.

The Court makes a record of the filings made by petitioner. Petitioner confirms it true and correct.

The Court confirms with petitioner the name to be changed to. Petitioner clarifies the pronunciation and the use of lower case letters.

Good cause appearing, The Court grants petitioner's request for a name change.

Decree changing name from Iris Renee Jackson to ielyso Jesus signed and filed by the court this day.

HEARING ON IRIS RENEE JACKSON'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME

Off Calendar Jun-14-2024 Off Calendar
